pattern: Simulate a dynamic list: find each query value's index, record it, then move the value to position 0.
hints: Maintain the current permutation as a list; for each query find the index of the query value with list.index() or indexOf().
After recording the current position, remove the element from its position and prepend it to the front.
Since m <= 1000 and queries.length <= m, the O(m^2) simulation is fast enough.

edge_inputs.description: query same element repeatedly, always at index 0 after first
query every element of P in order
element just moved to front is queried next
query value is at the last position each time

stress.generator_python:
def gen(rng, size):
    m = max(1, min(size, 1000))
    queries = [rng.randint(1, m) for _ in range(m)]
    return [queries, m]
